mods.name: Cold Air Intake
mods.description: Dual intake system feeds both banks of the VQ37VHR V6 with cooler, denser air for improved throttle response and a more aggressive induction note.
mods.partNumbers: Stillen Gen 3 Ultra Long Tube, K&N 69-7078TS
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airboxes (one per bank). Install new intake tubes and filters. Route away from exhaust heat. 30 minutes. No tune required.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: Unleash the VQ37 V6 exhaust note with a performance catback. The VQ series is known for its excellent exhaust sound when uncorked.
mods.partNumbers: Invidia Gemini HS08Z34GEM, Tomei Expreme Ti 440016
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the Y-pipe back. Dual exit design. Hangs on factory mounts. No cutting required. 1 hour on jack stands.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Drop the Z34 by 20–30mm for a sportier look and improved handling while maintaining daily comfort on stock dampers.
mods.partNumbers: Swift Spec-R Springs, Eibach Pro-Kit E10-63-020-02-22
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor required. Replace all four corners. Alignment mandatory after install. May need to trim rear bump stops slightly for optimal ride quality.

mods.name: Test Pipes / High-Flow Cats
mods.description: Replace the restrictive factory catalytic converters with test pipes or high-flow cats for significant exhaust flow improvement and power gains.
mods.partNumbers: Berk Technology BT1208, ISR Performance test pipes
mods.installNotes: Access from below on a lift. Pre-soak bolts. Test pipes will trigger CEL — O2 sensor spacers or UpRev tune required to suppress. Significant power gain in the mid-range.

mods.name: ECU Tune (UpRev)
mods.description: UpRev ECU tune optimizes VVT timing, fueling, and throttle maps for the VQ37VHR. Gains of 15–20hp with bolt-on mods, plus improved throttle feel.
mods.partNumbers: UpRev Osiris License, Consult III+ cable
mods.installNotes: Requires UpRev tuner with cable and laptop. Read stock ECU, apply base tune, then customize. Best results with custom dyno tune. Eliminates rev hang and improves throttle tip-in.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Fully adjustable coilovers transform the Z34 chassis with precise ride height, damping, and spring rate control for street or track use.
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. Set initial drop to 20mm. 8k/6k spring rates work well for street/track. Full alignment and corner balance recommended.

mods.name: Twin Turbo Kit
mods.description: A twin-turbo kit transforms the VQ37VHR from a strong NA engine to a 500+ hp monster. The factory bottom end handles moderate boost well.
mods.partNumbers: AAM Competition Twin Turbo Kit, Fast Intentions TT Kit
mods.installNotes: Comprehensive kit includes twin turbos, manifolds, intercooler, fuel system, and oil lines. Requires standalone ECU or UpRev advanced tune. Upgraded clutch mandatory. Budget 30+ hours for install and tuning.

mods.name: Lightweight Wheels
mods.description: Reduce unsprung weight with forged wheels for sharper handling response. The Z34 benefits noticeably from lighter wheels given its sports car focus.
mods.installNotes: Direct bolt-on. 19-inch wheels are standard fitment. Staggered setup recommended. 275/35R19 front and 295/30R19 rear is optimal for grip. Torque to 80 ft-lbs.
